items.title: Concept map of vector spaces
items.mermaid:
mindmap
  root(("Vector space"))
    vectors("Vectors")
      examplesRn("Examples: R^n, functions, embeddings")
    ops("Operations")
      add("Vector addition u + v")
      scale("Scalar multiplication c*v")
      linComb("Linear combinations")
      spanNode("Span of vectors")
    structure("Structure")
      basisNode("Basis and coordinates")
      dimNode("Dimension")
      subspacesNode("Subspaces")
items.caption: A vector space comes with vectors, operations (addition, scalar multiplication, linear combinations) and structural concepts like span, basis, dimension and subspaces.

items.title: Subspace inside a vector space
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Vspace["Vector space V"] --> Uspace["Subset U"]
  Uspace --> zeroVec["Zero vector 0 in U"]
  Uspace --> closedAdd["Closed under addition"]
  Uspace --> closedScale["Closed under scalar multiplication"]
items.caption: A subset U of V is a subspace exactly when it contains the zero vector and is closed under vector addition and scalar multiplication.
